paper_title: GPT-NeoX-20B: An Open-Source Autoregressive Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Uses rotary positional embeddings, parallel attention and feed-forward layers, and a modified initialization scheme to improve performance and efficiency in large-scale autoregressive language modeling
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, text generation, few-shot reasoning, knowledge-based tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling language models and improving performance in autoregressive language modeling
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Twelve Supermicro AS-4124GO-NART servers, each with eight NVIDIA A100-SXM4-40GB GPUs
raw_extraction.extension: Applies rotary positional embeddings to the first 25% of embedding dimensions, and computes attention and feed-forward layers in parallel to improve training efficiency
